prestazioni: 351C Cleveland V8 (engine code: 351C) bored to 408ci with forged internals (Scat crankshaft, Manley H-beam rods, JE 10.5:1 forged pistons) and ported/polished heads by Edelbrock with Ferrea 224/230° camshafts, Comp Cams lifters, and a Holley Sniper EFI system with dual 1,000 CFM throttle bodies for 550+ HP at 7,000 RPM

Custom 4-into-1 stainless steel headers by Stainless Works feeding into a Tial 44mm external wastegate and a custom 3.5" dual exhaust system with MagnaFlow 14815 mufflers and X-pipe crossover for optimized scavenging

Full chassis reinforcement with a De Tomaso Pantera-specific bolt-in roll cage by Autopower Industries, paired with a custom coilover suspension setup using Bilstein B16 PSS10 dampers, Eibach Pro-Kit springs, and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension for reduced compliance
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a De Tomaso Pantera-specific Rocket Bunny V2 aero kit (PANTERA-V2) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, extending track width by 3.5" for aggressive stance

Full custom interior retrim in Alcantara and Nappa leather by Katzkin, featuring Recaro SRD-E bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel, and a custom center console housing a Motec C127 dash display

Giallo Fly Yellow paint with matte black accents by BASF Glasurit, including a custom livery inspired by the 1972 Pantera GTS with blacked-out BBS LM wheels (9x17" front, 12x17" rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 315/35/17 rear)
